'''''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 18''' is the eighteenth issue of [[Star Wars Insider|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'']], later rebranded as the ''Star Wars Insider''. Issue 18 was published in [[January]] [[1993]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
===Features===
*"Trading Star Wars"
*"Behind the [[George Lucas: The Creative Impulse|Creative Impulse]]: [[Charles Champlin]]"
*"Young Indy Returns With Harrison Ford"
*"Star Wars Dream Book"
*"The Art of Drew Struzan"
